Summary:
Name firefox_124_vs_firefox_125
Branches Firefox124 Firefox125
StartDate 2024-01-22 2024-02-19
EndDate 2024-02-29 2024-03-05
Channel nightly nightly
All
metric
branch All results compared against control.
uplift
effect size (mwu) Effect size calculated by Rank Biserial Correlation.
performance_pageload_load_time Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
Firefox125
-6.4%
Medium (r=-0.05)
perf_page_load_time_ms Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.
Firefox125
+0.6%
Small (r=0.01)
performance_pageload_fcp The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).
Firefox125
-4.2%
Small (r=-0.04)
perf_first_contentful_paint_ms The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.
Firefox125
+0.6%
Small (r=0.01)
javascript_gc_minor_time The time taked by a minor (nursery) collection. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name.)
Firefox125
-58.0%
Large (r=-0.22)
gc_minor_us Time spent running JS minor GC (us)
Firefox125
-3.1%
Small (r=0.02)
javascript_gc_total_time The total time taken by a major collection. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name.)
Firefox125
-45.9%
Large (r=-0.26)
gc_ms Time spent running JS GC (ms)
Firefox125
-12.5%
Small (r=-0.02)
fcp_time Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.
Firefox125
+0.0%
None (p=0.68)
load_time Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.
Firefox125
+0.2%
None (p=0.04)
lcp_time Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.
Firefox125
+0.2%
None (p=0.24)
response_time Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.
Firefox125
+0.8%
Small (r=0.01)
js_exec_time Time spent executing JS during page load, in ms.
Firefox125
-1.2%
Small (r=-0.01)

Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "firefox_124_vs_firefox_125",
    "histograms": {
        "metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical",
            "max": 50000
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name).\n",
            "kind": "numerical",
            "max": 50000
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "The time taked by a minor (nursery) collection. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name.)\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS minor GC (us)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time": {
            "glean": true,
            "desc": "The total time taken by a major collection. (Migrated from the geckoview metric of the same name.)\n",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent running JS GC (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        }
    },
    "branches": [
        {
            "name": "Firefox124",
            "startDate": "2024-01-22",
            "endDate": "2024-02-29",
            "channel": "nightly",
            "version": 124,
            "conditions": []
        },
        {
            "name": "Firefox125",
            "startDate": "2024-02-19",
            "endDate": "2024-03-05",
            "channel": "nightly",
            "version": 125,
            "conditions": []
        }
    ],
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 3000
        },
        "load_time": {
            "desc": "Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "lcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "response_time": {
            "desc": "Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 3000
        },
        "js_exec_time": {
            "desc": "Time spent executing JS during page load, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 3000
        }
    },
    "segments": [
        "All",
        "Windows",
        "Linux",
        "Mac"
    ],
    "is_experiment": false
}
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_desktop
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_android
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_desktop
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_android
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_android
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_desktop
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_android
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_desktop
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_android
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_android
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    lcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_desktop
WHERE
    lcp_time > 0 AND lcp_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    lcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_android
WHERE
    lcp_time > 0 AND lcp_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    lcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_desktop
WHERE
    lcp_time > 0 AND lcp_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    lcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_android
WHERE
    lcp_time > 0 AND lcp_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_android
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_desktop
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_android
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_desktop
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_android
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_android
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_desktop
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
aggregate_Firefox124_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox124" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox124_android
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_desktop as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_desktop
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
),
eventdata_Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.fenix.pageload` as m
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
aggregate_Firefox125_android as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox125" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox125_android
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox125_android
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
)
,
Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_load_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_desktop
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY 
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox124,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox124
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox125 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox125,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox125
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox124
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox125
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
)
,
Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.performance_pageload_fcp is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_desktop
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY 
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox124,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox124
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox125 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox125,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox125
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox124
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox125
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
)
,
Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_minor_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_desktop
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY 
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox124,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox124
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox125 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_minor_us is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox125,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox125
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox124
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox125
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
Firefox124_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
)
,
Firefox125_desktop as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.metrics` as d
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
Firefox125_android as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        CAST(key as INT64)/1000000 AS bucket,
        value as count
    FROM `mozdata.fenix.metrics` as f
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time.values)
    WHERE 
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND metrics.timing_distribution.javascript_gc_total_time is not null
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox124_desktop
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_android
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Firefox125_desktop
    ) s
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY 
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox124 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox124" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-22')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-29')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "124"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox124,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox124 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox124
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox125 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox125" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-02-19')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-03-05')    
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "125"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox125,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox125 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox125
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox124
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox125
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
